other_observers: BKP and several others; BPG found it
specific_location: Headquarters pond area of Chico Basin Ranch
description: A large warbler olive-green above. Bright yellow below from the lower breast to the undertail coverts. The head and upper breast was hooded in dark gray. Blaskish around the eye with some blackish mottling on the upper breastBehaviors: foraging in low willows around a small pondCall: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brian P Gibbons, Brian P Gibbons
